case_title: LAURA RUCHINSKAS et al VS. HAIYAN CHEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED FEB-06-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, HAIYAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY RUCHINSKAS, LAURA SONKIN, ANASTASIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, HAIYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES (2) BY PLAINTIFFS, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RUCHINSKAS, LAURA SONKIN, ANASTASIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUCHINSKAS, LAURA SONKIN, ANASTASIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, HAIYAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,500.00 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CC 1950.5 (C) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
